name: Proposify Sales Proposal Management API
what_it_does: Proposify sales proposal management REST API for sales teams to create, track, and close proposals and quotes with e-signature, template library, and CRM integration for streamlined deal closure automation. Enables AI agents to manage proposal creation from template library for sales content automation, handle proposal sending and tracking for pipeline visibility automation, access proposal view analytics and engagement metrics for sales intelligence automation, retrieve e-signature collection and acceptance workflow for contract automation, manage client input forms for information collection automation, handle proposal approval routing for team review automation, access quote and fee table management for pricing automation, retrieve proposal version management for negotiation tracking automation, manage workspace template creation for consistent brand automation, and integrate Proposify with Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Zapier, and Slack for end-to-end sales proposal workflow automation.
use_cases: Generating proposals from CRM-triggered sales agents
Tracking proposal engagement from sales analytics agents
Collecting e-signatures from contract automation agents
Managing quote pricing from dynamic quoting agents
not_for: Complex contract lifecycle management with redlining (use Ironclad or DocuSign CLM)
Interactive web-based proposals (use Qwilr for web-native proposals)
Simple PDF generation without sales workflow
best_when: A sales team wanting AI agents to automate template-based proposal creation, CRM-triggered sending, buyer engagement tracking, and e-signature collection through Proposify's structured proposal management platform.
avoid_when: TEMPLATE CONTENT LOCKED IN PROPOSIFY EDITOR: Proposify proposal content is created and stored within Proposify's editor; automated content generation that creates proposals from external content must import into Proposify template; automated proposals using external HTML or PDF directly cannot benefit from Proposify's analytics and e-signature tracking. PROPOSAL ANALYTICS TRACKING REQUIRES PROPOSIFY-HOSTED LINK: Proposify analytics (views, time spent, page engagement) require buyer to access proposal via Proposify-hosted link; automated distribution that downloads PDF and distributes via email attachment loses all analytics tracking capability; automated tracking workflows must distribute Proposify share link, not downloaded PDF. CLIENT INPUT FORM ASYNC COMPLETION FOR AUTOMATED WORKFLOW: Proposify client input forms (for collecting buyer information within proposal) require buyer to complete form before workflow can continue; automated deal data collection via client input forms is not synchronous; automated workflow must handle asynchronous form completion via webhook rather than expecting immediate response.

auth.notes: Proposify uses API key and OAuth for integrations. REST API with JSON. Halifax, Nova Scotia, Canada HQ. Founded 2013 by Kevin Springer and Kyle Racki. Backed by Anchor Capital, Shasta Ventures ($25M+ raised). Products: Proposal templates, e-signature, fee tables, approval routing, client forms, analytics. Integrations: Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Zapier, Slack, Stripe. GDPR. CASL. Serves SMB to enterprise sales teams. Competes with PandaDoc, Qwilr, and Better Proposals for sales proposal management.

pricing.notes: Halifax NS Canada. Shasta Ventures backed. Per-user subscription. 14-day trial. Annual discount. GDPR, CASL.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; proposal and analytics queries throttled; webhooks for proposal view, accept, decline, and sign events

known_agent_gotchas: TEMPLATE VARIABLE POPULATION REQUIRED FOR PERSONALIZATION: Proposify templates use variables ({{client_name}}, {{deal_value}}) for CRM personalization; automated proposal generation must populate all template variables before sending; automated proposal creation with unpopulated variables shows raw {{variable}} placeholder text to buyer in final proposal

PROPOSAL STATUS STATE MACHINE FOR AUTOMATION: Proposify proposals follow status flow (draft → sent → viewed → accepted/declined); automated pipeline automation must respect state machine; automated CRM stage update triggered on proposal send (rather than on acceptance) creates premature pipeline advancement

FEE TABLE PRICING LOCK AFTER ACCEPTANCE: Proposify fee tables (pricing sections) are locked after buyer acceptance; automated pricing adjustment workflows cannot modify fee table on accepted proposal; automated pricing correction requires creating new proposal version rather than editing accepted proposal

MULTI-USER APPROVAL ROUTING TIMING: Proposify approval routing (manager review before sending) adds async step before proposal can be sent; automated proposal send workflow must handle approval routing state; automated send that skips approval routing check on workflows requiring approval creates queued-not-sent state without error notification

STRIPE PAYMENT INTEGRATION REQUIRES SEPARATE STRIPE SETUP: Proposify payment collection on acceptance uses Stripe integration; automated proposal-to-payment workflows require separate Stripe account configuration in Proposify; automated deal closure with payment collection via Proposify must verify Stripe integration is active before configuring payment-required proposals
agent_readiness.security_notes: Sales proposals. GDPR, CASL. API key/OAuth2. CA/US. Proposal content and signature data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Sales proposals. GDPR, CASL. API key/OAuth2. CA/US. Proposal and signature data.
